jenny.heroDescription: Your AI-powered business partner that answers calls, writes quotes, handles reviews, and keeps you compliant — 24/7.
jenny.heroSubtext: While you're on the job, Jenny's got your back.
jenny.freeNote: Jenny Lite included free on all plans
jenny.featuresTitle: Everything Jenny Can Do For You
jenny.featuresSubtitle: Jenny handles the busywork so you can focus on what you do best — your trade.
jenny.tryEachFeatureSubtitle: Click any card to see an interactive demo
jenny.comparisonSubtitle: See how Jenny stacks up against Jobber and HouseCall Pro
jenny.jobberAiNote: * Jobber AI Receptionist is an additional $349+/month on top of their base plan
jenny.songDescription: Just like the song, our Jenny is unforgettable. She'll answer your calls, capture your leads, and make sure you never miss an opportunity.
jenny.songQuote: "Jenny, Jenny, who can I turn to?" — Now you know.
jenny.readyDescription: Jenny Lite is included free with every ToolTime Pro plan. Upgrade to Jenny Pro for $49/mo. Jobber charges $349/mo for this.
jenny.copyright: 2026 ToolTime Pro. Jenny is your AI-powered business assistant.

onboarding.setupSubtitle: Let's get your account set up in a few quick steps.
onboarding.companyDetailsSubtitle: Add your business info so customers can find you.
onboarding.industrySubtitle: Select one or more. We'll suggest services based on your selection.
onboarding.yourServices: Your services — uncheck any you don't offer:
onboarding.noIndustryHint: Don't see your industry? Add your services manually:
onboarding.typeServiceHint: Type a service name and press Enter
onboarding.inviteTeamSubtitle: Add team members now or skip and do it later from the Team page.
onboarding.inviteMoreHint: You can invite more team members anytime from
onboarding.calendarSubtitle: Sync your jobs to Google Calendar so you never miss an appointment.
onboarding.calendarConnectedMessage: Your scheduled jobs will automatically sync to your Google Calendar.
onboarding.calendarBenefit1: Jobs automatically appear on your phone and desktop calendar
onboarding.calendarBenefit3: Your team stays in sync with shared calendars
onboarding.calendarSkipHint: You can always connect later from Settings > Integrations
onboarding.secureSubtitle: Add two-factor authentication for extra security when logging in.
onboarding.twoFaEnabledMessage: You'll receive a verification code via SMS each time you log in from a new device.
onboarding.twoFaCodeHint: We'll send a 6-digit code to this number when you log in from an unrecognized device.
onboarding.twoFaSecurityHint: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security. You can also set this up later from
onboarding.betaTesterPlan: access — all features unlocked on the
onboarding.proPlanTrialSuffix: free trial — 14 days of full access, no credit card required.
onboarding.accountLoading: Account data is still loading. Please wait a moment and try again.
onboarding.paymentMethodsTitle: How do your customers pay you?
onboarding.paymentMethodsSubtitle: Select all the ways you accept payment. This info appears on your invoices.
onboarding.paymentMethodsHint: These payment options will appear on every invoice you send. You can change them anytime in Settings.
onboarding.paymentMethodsSkipHint: No worries — you can set up payment methods later from Settings. Your invoices will still work without them.
onboarding.phoneHelperText: Appears on your invoices and quotes so customers can reach you.
onboarding.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number.
onboarding.calendarFailed: Failed to connect. Please try again.
onboarding.payPaypalHelper: Your PayPal.me link or PayPal email
onboarding.payCheckPlaceholder: Payable to: Your Business Name LLC
onboarding.payCheckHelper: Business name checks should be made out to
onboarding.payOtherHelper: Any other way you accept payment

booking.tellUsReach: Tell us how to reach you.
booking.notesPlaceholder: Any special instructions or details about the job...
booking.smsConsent: I agree to receive SMS/text message notifications about my appointment (confirmations, reminders, and updates) from {company} via ToolTime Pro. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency varies. Reply STOP to opt out or HELP for help at any time.

invoice.paymentProcessing: Your payment is being processed. This page will update once confirmed.

quote.quoteNotFoundMessage: The quote you're looking for doesn't exist or has expired.
quote.depositReceived: Thank you! Your deposit has been received.
quote.scheduleMessage: Let us know the best time to reach you and we'll call to set up your service date.

quote.contactUpdated: Please contact us for an updated quote.

quote.failedDecline: Failed to decline quote. Please try again.
